Step 1: Assess your current fitness level to set appropriate goals.
Step 2: Warm up with 5-10 minutes of light cardio to increase blood flow.

Step 8: Add planks to your routine, holding for 30-60 seconds, three times.

Step 12: Try lateral lunges to work the legs and glutes, three sets of 10 reps per leg.
Step 13: Finish with calf raises, standing on a step if needed, three sets of 15-20 reps.
Step 14: Cool down with stretching focusing on major muscle groups used during the workout.
Step 15: Drink plenty of water throughout the day to stay hydrated.
Step 16: Rest at least one full day between workouts to allow muscles to recover.
